prompt: Create user flows and wireframes for the e-commerce checkout experience based on our PRD
expected_output: Skill locates the PRD via prism-locator, reads it fully, invokes /generate_user_flows with the PRD path, generates user personas, ASCII flow diagrams, wireframes, component library, and responsive specs, then saves to .prism/shared/plans/
expectations: PRD is located and read fully before generating visual docs
/generate_user_flows command is invoked with the PRD file path
Next workflow steps are offered including /prism-plan and /prism-implement
